payload.answer: The entropy-tuned PPO-002 run demonstrated superior performance over the baseline PPO-001, with higher reward (0.18 vs. 0.12) and Sharpe ratio (0.51 vs. 0.45).

entity_resolution.reason: Consistent run identifier across all rows.

memory_cards.statement: The baseline PPO-001 run achieved a reward of 0.12 and a Sharpe ratio of 0.45.
The entropy-tuned PPO-002 run achieved a reward of 0.18 and a Sharpe ratio of 0.51.
PPO-002 outperformed PPO-001 in both reward (0.18 vs. 0.12) and Sharpe ratio (0.51 vs. 0.45), indicating the entropy tuning improved performance.
